title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, enabling advance evacuation warnings days before the Category 5 storm reached Jamaica. The model is being developed in collaboration with the National Hurricane Center.
